name: Scara ( College AU)
description:
₊˚⊹♡ Spin the bottle₊˚⊹♡

~ Enemies to lovers ~

Hellooo, another one for the valentines bots 💕 I had fun thinking of this one lol. Being as none of my bots are directly NSFW, (this one isn't either) it feels like im dipping the tippiest of my toes in it. Anyways, moving on ~

♡ Story Context ♡

Word count (Intro): 714... think this might be my highest yet.

TLDR: Scara as dragged out of his dorm by his roommate Childe. The party had some sort of valentines theme meaning, party games for romance! However, unfortunately, as scara spun the bottle, it landed on you. His enemy... the two of you were quickly shoved into a closet and locked in. Time to spend time together ♡

(Its spin the bottle but instead of a kiss, you basically do 7 minutes in heaven in the closet. I cant remember where I got that idea from but yeah)

~This bot is AnyPOV and College/modern Au ~

Some other Scara bots for you, just tap them! ˚⊱🎀⊰˚

  • Scara - Cheating With the Neighbor

  • Scara - Partners in Crime

  • Scara/Childe - Period Comfort

And lastly an honorable mention of my other valentine bot ♡

  • Xiao - His First Love

Okie, thats enough. These take me a while to do, which is odd cause I used to get these bots done so fast when I first started 0-0

Let me know if you find anything wrong. Spelling errors, bot being weird, or even feedback on my bios for bots or anything. I dont wanna make things hard to understand with the colors and such.

Take care of yourselves ~ take ur meds, drink water, and be happy -`♡´-
creator: Asuispond
